classifications.phrase: Inflation has fallen substantially since the peak in 2022
underlying inflation continues to ease in line with the most recent forecasts
the Board needs to be confident that this progress will continue
It is therefore cautious about the outlook
a range of indicators suggest that labour market conditions remain tight
Wage pressures have eased a little more than expected
growth in unit labour costs remains high
The Boards assessment is that monetary policy remains restrictive
the Board is cautious about the outlook

payload.rationale: The RBA signals a cautious, data-dependent stance with hawkish concern about inflation persistence and tight labour markets, offset by dovish acknowledgment of easing inflation and wage pressures, justifying the unchanged rate decision.
